title: Long Context Surface (Phase 0 contract lock)
description: Normalized lane assignment for a prompt assembly request. This object is always present, never inferred downstream, and treated as immutable once produced. Phase 0 supports only LC-1, LC-2, LC-4 locally.

summary_allowed.description: True only when lossy summarization is permitted by the lane.

sliding_window_allowed.description: True only when sliding-window truncation is permitted by the lane.

full_trace_required.description: True when the lane requires the unmodified governance trace to be present in the bundle.

governance_no_amnesia.description: True when the lane forbids any compaction step that would silently drop governance state.

partitioned_execution.description: True when the lane requires partitioned execution across bounded sections rather than monolithic assembly.

degraded.description: True when the lane was assigned in a degraded posture (e.g., LC-2 fallback from LC-1 because a precondition failed).
